name: go-for-launch
description: Go for Launch, a toolbox for Astro sites: migrate and maintain sites, automate web and native mobile Safari testing, enforce SEO and PageSpeed release gates, and configure optional design-system review.
author: GovSoft, LLC

scripts.test: astro check && node scripts/check-docs.mjs && node scripts/test-sitemap-verifier.mjs && node scripts/test-seo-verifier.mjs && node scripts/test-semantic-seo-verifier.mjs && node scripts/test-site-health-verifier.mjs && node scripts/test-ahrefs-site-audit.mjs && node scripts/test-redirect-verifier.mjs && node scripts/test-open-graph-generator.mjs && node scripts/test-artwork-suitability.mjs && node scripts/test-brand-assets.mjs && node scripts/test-design-gate.mjs && node scripts/test-render-sharpness.mjs && node scripts/test-side-navigation-verifier.mjs && node scripts/test-visual-composition.mjs
